methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_channel_search_engine_product.models.product_product.ProductProduct.write
documentation: ProductProduct do not inherit of sale.channel.owner
as it's the ProductTemplate that inherit it
so activating or inactivating should trigger an index synchronization
